name: global brain volumes
description: Quantitative assessment of global brain tissue compartments for evaluation of neurodegeneration, traumatic brain injury, and other conditions affecting overall brain volume.

attributes.name: whole brain volume
attributes.description: Absolute volume of the entire brain, clinically relevant for global atrophy assessment.

attributes.name: whole brain % of ICV
attributes.description: Percentage of intracranial volume occupied by the whole brain, used to normalize for head size.

attributes.name: whole brain normative percentile
attributes.description: Age- and sex-adjusted percentile for whole brain volume, clinically relevant for detecting global atrophy.

attributes.name: forebrain parenchyma volume (left)
attributes.description: Volume of left forebrain parenchyma, important for cortical and subcortical integrity assessment.

attributes.name: forebrain parenchyma volume (right)
attributes.description: Volume of right forebrain parenchyma, clinically relevant for asymmetry and focal atrophy.

attributes.name: cortical gray matter volume
attributes.description: Total cortical gray matter volume, clinically relevant for neurodegenerative disease monitoring.

attributes.name: cerebral white matter volume
attributes.description: Total cerebral white matter volume, clinically relevant for demyelinating disorders and global atrophy.

attributes.name: cerebral white matter hypointensities volume
attributes.description: Volume of hypointense white matter regions, clinically relevant for small vessel disease and demyelination.
